function.message: I can’t complete this inbox request as written because one of the five requested OCR targets is missing from the workspace. I verified four purchase records are present and readable, but the fifth listed target does not exist as a file. Please provide the correct fifth path (or confirm the list should contain only four files), and I can then complete the OCR/frontmatter migration in one pass.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed process-next-inbox-item workflow and inbox rules; for structured-record OCR checked inbox-processing-v2-update, ocr-records, migrate-records-to-frontmatter, and finance schema. Per clarification policy, did not perform partial edits when one required file is missing.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox task explicitly requests OCR for five files, but only four corresponding purchase notes could be read. Additional lookup confirmed the fifth filename appears only in the inbox request text and not as a real file, so required source data is incomplete.
